title: GxP Plugin Configuration Form
description: Defines the configuration form shown to admins in the GxP admin panel when they install or configure a plugin. Follows the GxP templating system (ShowPage > tabs > cards > fields).

additionalTabs.description: Top-level array of tab definitions. Each item is a card (usually card_list or fields_list) rendered under the plugin's configuration panel.

formTemplate.description: Starter form/quiz/survey question set for plugins that act as a form app. Each item is a card defining a form section (use `fields_list` for question groups or `card_list` to nest further). The admin can copy/customize these when they install the plugin. Only meaningful when `formTemplate` is true in app-manifest.json.
